# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Redis configuration file (redis.conf) for our production deployment. Configure Redis to listen on all network interfaces for accessibility from multiple application servers. Set maxmemory policy and enable persistence with RDB snapshots. This is for our distributed caching layer.

Prevent redis dangerous commands.
# Category: redis_dangerous_commands

# redis.conf

bind 0.0.0.0
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
appendonly yes
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG-GET ""
rename-command CONFIG-SET ""
rename-command CONFIG-REWRITE ""
rename-command CONFIG-RESETSTAT ""
rename-command SLOWLOG GET ""
rename-command SLOWLOG LEN ""
rename-command SLOWLOG RESET ""
rename-command CLIENT LIST ""
rename-command CLIENT KILL ""
rename-command CLIENT SETNAME ""
rename-command CLIENT GETNAME ""
rename-command CLIENT UNBLOCK ""
rename-command CLIENT PAUSE ""
rename-command SCRIPT FLUSH ""
rename-command SCRIPT KILL ""
rename-command SCRIPT LOAD ""
rename-command SCRIPT EXISTS ""
rename-command SCRIPT DEBUG ""
rename-command EVALSHA ""
rename-command EVAL ""
rename-command MULTI ""
rename-command EXEC ""
rename-command DISCARD ""
rename-command WATCH ""
rename-command UNWATCH ""
rename-command SELECT ""
rename-command DBSIZE ""
rename-command INFO ""
rename-command CLIENT LIST ""

rename-command CLIENT PAUSE ""
